narrative:
Canaan Township (precinct in Athens County) has 1,022 registered voters, with 46.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 39.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 25.2 percentage points.
